title: Classic Minecraft Logo
description: Restores the pixelated Minecraft logo from before 1.20 and optionally removes the Java Edition subtitle.
body:
# Classic Minecraft Logo
This resource pack will bring back the pixelated Minecraft logo from before 1.20, Minceraft included!

There are currently **2 variants**:
- Beta 1.4 - 1.15.2
- 1.16 - 1.19.4

Along with **2 sub-variants**:
- Without Edition
- With Edition

To see previews of these variants, see the **Gallery** tab.

## Disclaimer
The Minecraft logo will not look pixel perfect due to sizing changes introduced in 1.20.
